query:
SELECT NOW() as db_now, CURDATE() as db_today;
SELECT gameDate, sport, publishedToFeed, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM games
WHERE publishedToFeed = 1
GROUP BY gameDate, sport, publishedToFeed
ORDER BY gameDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
